column9: Our school is still focused on establishing basic infrastructure and facilities.
column10: Much of our effort goes into creating visibility and awareness in the local community.
column11: Admission numbers are unpredictable and heavily dependent on word of mouth.
column12: Systems and processes are still evolving (academic, administrative, communication).
column13: We are still working on building the initial trust of parents in the school.
column14: The school has steady enrollment growth year after year.
column15: Policies, SOPs, and workflows are defined and generally followed.
column16: Our priority is to consistently deliver good academic outcomes.
column17: Parent communication and engagement activities are structured and regular.
column18: Teacher professional development is provided, though not always systematically.
column19: The school invests in innovation (STEM labs, international programs, Olympiads, etc.).
column20: Middle-level leadership (coordinators, HODs) plays an active role in decision-making
column21: We differentiate ourselves clearly from competitor schools in the area.
column22: Technology is integrated effectively into teaching, learning, and administration.
column23: Faculty are encouraged to mentor, experiment, and innovate beyond classroom teaching.
column24: The school enjoys a strong and stable reputation in the community.
column25: Alumni engagement is strong and contributes to the school’s image.
column26: The school is recognized at the state/national/international level for excellence.
column27: Faculty are involved in research, publications, and knowledge-sharing.
column28: Our focus is now on sustaining legacy, preparing successors, and building long-term impact.
